hero.title: One Line. Autonomous Trading.
hero.subtitle: Type one sentence into OpenClaw and get a fully autonomous AI trading agent — across Polymarket, Hyperliquid, and more. Non-custodial. Multi-chain.

quickstart.title: Just Say This in OpenClaw
quickstart.description: You already have OpenClaw. Just type this one line — the AI handles everything: plugin install, wallet creation, fund bridging, and trading.
quickstart.oneliner: Install the a2ex plugin, set up my wallets, and start trading on Polymarket
quickstart.label: Type this into OpenClaw chat:
quickstart.result: That's it. a2ex installs itself, creates non-custodial wallets, bridges your funds, and starts executing trades — all from this one instruction.

trading.title: Autonomous Trading
trading.description: AI executes trades on Polymarket, Hyperliquid, and more — 24/7, without human intervention.

security.title: Non-Custodial Security
security.description: 2-wallet model (Vault + Hot) with MPC signing. Your keys never leave your machine.

multichain.title: Multi-Chain
multichain.description: Arbitrum, Polygon, and cross-chain bridges. One agent handles multiple networks seamlessly.

simple.title: Zero Config
simple.description: No setup files. No API keys to manage. Just tell OpenClaw what you want — a2ex figures out the rest.

howItWorks.title: What Happens When You Type That Line

steps.title: Plugin installs itself
steps.description: OpenClaw downloads and configures a2ex automatically.

steps.title: Wallets are created
steps.description: A Vault wallet (cold, approval-based) and a Hot wallet (instant, $50 limit) — non-custodial, on your machine.

steps.title: Funds are bridged
steps.description: a2ex bridges your USDC to the right chain for each venue via Across.

steps.title: Trades execute
steps.description: AI places orders on Polymarket, Hyperliquid, or any connected venue.

architecture.title: Under the Hood
architecture.description: a2ex runs as an OpenClaw plugin. When you give a trading instruction, three programs work together inside your OpenClaw container.

footer.tagline: Built by Iotrust. An OpenClaw plugin for the agentic trading era.

docs.title: Getting Started with a2ex
docs.subtitle: Already running OpenClaw? You're one sentence away from autonomous trading.

prerequisites.title: What You Need
prerequisites.openclaw: OpenClaw running (any version with plugin support)
prerequisites.note: That's it. No API keys, no config files, no Docker knowledge needed.

quick.title: The Quick Way (One Line)
quick.description: Open your OpenClaw chat and type:
quick.prompt: Install the a2ex plugin, set up my wallets, and start trading on Polymarket
quick.note: OpenClaw will handle everything: download the plugin, create wallets, ask you to fund them, and start trading. You can intervene or ask questions at any time.

step1.title: Step 1: Install the Plugin
step1.description: Tell OpenClaw to install a2ex. The AI downloads and configures it.
step1.note: The plugin registers 22+ trading tools with your OpenClaw agent.

step2.title: Step 2: Bootstrap Your Wallets
step2.description: a2ex creates a secure wallet infrastructure on your machine.
step2.prompt: Bootstrap a2ex and set up my trading wallets
step2.note: Creates a Vault wallet (cold, approval-based) and a Hot wallet (instant, $50 limit). Your master password is the only recovery method — save it.
step2.warning: Never share your master password. It controls your wallet infrastructure.

step3.title: Step 3: Fund Your Wallet
step3.description: Send USDC and ETH to the vault address the AI shows you.
step3.note: Send USDC (for trades) and ETH (for gas) on Arbitrum to the vault address.

step4.title: Step 4: Start Trading
step4.description: Tell the AI what to trade. It handles bridging, approvals, and execution.
step4.prompt: Trade on Polymarket: buy YES on the top trending market
step4.note: a2ex bridges funds, approves tokens, and executes the trade. Monitor with: "Show my trading status"

limitations.title: Known Limitations (Early Access)
items: WAIaaS session may expire after extended idle — AI auto-recovers
